model_route.execution: direct authorized worker; no additional worker or model dispatch

existing_work_audit.finding: The promoted evidence-state service and existing nine-advisor route already own classification, eligibility, retirement, abstention, and no-dispatch translation. This fixture extends that system with refill freshness evidence; it creates no advisor architecture, route, prompt source, queue, or runtime state.

freshness_receipt.state_source: read-only Lead and Follow git status plus four packet source files
freshness_receipt.reuse_basis: HEAD, default porcelain-v2 status hash/count, and all four source hashes exactly match the accepted transaction; the exact accepted packet is reused.

prompt_catalog.text:
PORTFOLIO ADVISOR PROMPT CATALOG v1
COMMON CONTRACT
Read only the supplied version-1 evidence-state packet. Cite only advisor-eligible active, blocked, or open work IDs. Never revive completed or superseded work, resolve owner-dependent choices, infer unknown state, create generic process filler, dispatch work, or mutate state. Return exactly one outcome for this advisor: an actionable card, a perspective-only card, or an honest abstention. Actionable cards need YES/NO controls; perspective-only cards and abstentions have no controls. Prefer abstention to unsupported advice. Keep wording plain, field-readable, and semantically distinct from retired, pending-accepted, and unseen cards.

ADVISOR fan
Find the smallest evidence-backed moment a user could genuinely value or want to repeat. Do not convert an active prototype into a completion claim.

ADVISOR critic
Identify the sharpest evidenced failure mode or acceptance risk and turn it into one bounded field check. Do not restate the blocker without a discriminating check.

ADVISOR futurist
Explain the most important trajectory or sequencing implication supported by the evidence. Do not invent market, platform, or roadmap facts.

ADVISOR inventor
Propose one bounded recombination or experiment using only evidenced active/open elements. It must be reversible and narrower than the whole open slice.

ADVISOR publicist
Give one evidence-honest framing or communication action. Distinguish active prototype capability from verified completion and name material limitations when relevant.

ADVISOR money
Give cost, leverage, pricing, or sustainability advice only when the packet contains a financial or resource basis; otherwise abstain plainly.

ADVISOR operations
Turn evidenced work into one bounded sequence, stop condition, or reliability check. Do not create a generic planning task.

ADVISOR trust
Give privacy, safety, accessibility, integrity, or trust advice only when the packet supports it; otherwise abstain plainly.

ADVISOR design
Translate evidenced interaction or presentation gaps into one observable design criterion. Do not merely repeat the desired feature list.
prompt_catalog.hash_basis: SHA-256 of exact UTF-8 text bytes above

packet.translation_boundary: Translate only eligible active, blocked, or open evidence into project-specific advice. Never dispatch. Abstain rather than inventing a path, claim, owner decision, or generic process task.

outcomes.title: Test whether the first checkpoint earns a replay
outcomes.body: Show the phone-served prologue and first dance checkpoint without explanation, then ask one tester what moment they would choose to repeat. Keep the card only if they name a concrete moment rather than the idea of a dance game.
outcomes.control_rationale: A bounded user-value check can be accepted or declined without dispatching work.

outcomes.title: Check the exact handoff where chemistry breaks
outcomes.body: Review the move from the first dance checkpoint into partnered motion and mark the first instant when the pair stops reading as two bodies responding to each other. Use that instant—not the broad 95% gap—as the next correction target.
outcomes.control_rationale: It selects a concrete failure point and deserves an explicit decision.

outcomes.title: Treat embodiment as a staircase, not one leap
outcomes.body: The open direction already has a useful order: believable arm/body contact first, knee action second, and ankle/foot articulation later. That sequence protects the active phone checkpoint from being buried under a simultaneous full-body rewrite.
outcomes.control_rationale: This is sequencing perspective, not a discrete accept/decline action.

outcomes.title: Prototype one contact-to-knee response
outcomes.body: In one bounded version of the existing checkpoint, let a single arm/body contact cue trigger one visible knee response. Leave ankle and foot articulation out of this experiment so it can reveal whether contact alone improves the sense of following.
outcomes.control_rationale: It is a reversible, narrow experiment with a clear scope boundary.

outcomes.title: Name the prototype and the gap in one breath
outcomes.body: Describe Lead and Follow as a phone-served first prologue and dance checkpoint, then immediately say that partner chemistry and mechanics are still below the 95% bar. Do not present it as a finished dance simulation.
outcomes.control_rationale: The framing is a concrete communication choice that can be accepted or declined.

outcomes.title: No financial advice from this packet
outcomes.body: The packet has no cost, budget, time, pricing, revenue, or resource-allocation evidence. A money recommendation would be invented, so this advisor abstains.

outcomes.title: Stage the open body-mechanics slice
outcomes.body: Keep the active phone checkpoint intact while testing the open work in dependency order: arm/body contact, then knee action, then later ankle/foot articulation. Stop after the first stage if it does not improve the blocked partner-chemistry gap.
outcomes.control_rationale: This is an operational sequence with an explicit stop condition.

outcomes.title: No trust claim from this packet
outcomes.body: The packet contains no privacy, safety, accessibility, security, consent, or data-integrity evidence. The advisor cannot responsibly turn the quality gap into a trust recommendation.

outcomes.title: Make following readable without a drawn connection
outcomes.body: For the next design check, require the pair’s arm/body contact and knee action to make the follow response legible on the phone without relying on an abstract connection line. Defer ankle/foot detail until that read works.
outcomes.control_rationale: It defines an observable design criterion and deserves an explicit decision.

usefulness_gate.rule: Apply three YES and three NO decisions only when six genuinely decisionable cards exist.
usefulness_gate.reason: Exactly six actionable cards passed all grading dimensions; three outcomes are perspective-only or abstentions.

transaction_local_decisions.reason: This transaction prioritizes mechanics evidence over user interviewing.
It narrows the broad blocker to one observable failure instant.
It separates contact value from later articulation work.
Positioning is premature while embodiment remains unresolved.
The three-stage sequence is broader than the smallest proof.
It tests whether embodiment reads at phone scale.

cycle_b.refill_policy: Refill only decided Cycle A slots; retire decided cards before selection.

outcomes.title: Find the moment worth showing twice
outcomes.body: Instead of interviewing a tester, replay the existing phone checkpoint once at normal speed and once paused at the strongest embodied moment. If no frame makes the pair’s appeal obvious without explanation, record that as evidence for the blocked character-and-chemistry gap.
outcomes.control_rationale: NO replacement: a frame-level replay proof, not a tester interview.

outcomes.title: Separate contact failure from timing failure
outcomes.body: The accepted handoff-break check is still pending. Without replacing it, label the observed break as either missing body contact or a late or unclear partner response; do not open a second correction until that distinction is recorded.
outcomes.control_rationale: YES replacement acknowledges the pending item and adds a diagnostic distinction.

outcomes.title: Compare one contact cue with and without knee response
outcomes.body: The accepted contact-to-knee prototype remains pending. Preserve it, and use its two smallest states—contact alone versus contact plus one knee response—as the comparison; do not add ankle or foot work to either state.
outcomes.control_rationale: YES replacement adds a comparison method inside the pending experiment.

outcomes.title: Caption evidence, not ambition
outcomes.body: Instead of rewriting the project pitch, attach one plain caption to the existing phone checkpoint: what is visibly running, what remains below the 95% bar, and that fuller body contact is the open next direction.
outcomes.control_rationale: NO replacement changes from positioning to evidence-caption discipline.

outcomes.title: Protect one comparison seam
outcomes.body: Instead of scheduling all three body-mechanics stages, preserve the current phone checkpoint as the baseline and compare it with only the first arm/body-contact change. Stop before knee or ankle work if the comparison does not improve the blocked partner-chemistry read.
outcomes.control_rationale: NO replacement changes to one baseline comparison and stop seam.

outcomes.title: Define the next phone-scale read after contact
outcomes.body: The accepted no-abstract-line contact criterion remains pending. Keep it unchanged; once it passes, check whether one knee bend or straighten is still readable at phone scale before considering later ankle or foot detail.
outcomes.control_rationale: YES replacement defers a non-conflicting follow-on criterion until the pending item passes.

evidence_packet_reuse.reason: Repository snapshot and packet sources were unchanged.

items.difference: Drops the plan and protects one stop seam.

items.acknowledgement: The accepted handoff-break check is still pending.
The accepted contact-to-knee prototype remains pending.
The accepted no-abstract-line contact criterion remains pending.
items.non_conflict: Defers a later knee criterion until it passes.

unseen_card_stability.rule: No Cycle B replacement exists for an undecided slot.

semantic_near_duplicate_gate.method: Reject when advisor intent, evidence target, operator action, and success test remain equivalent after normalization.

rejected_candidates.candidate: Find the first point where the couple no longer feels responsive and fix that point next.
rejected_candidates.reason: Same failure instant and correction intent.

rejected_candidates.candidate: Try one body-contact signal that causes a visible knee bend before adding foot detail.
Make partner response readable on the phone through contact and knees, not connection graphics.

provider_prompt_cache_telemetry.statement: No provider prompt-cache hit is claimed.

dispatch_receipt.statement: Simulation only; no card was dispatched.

field_read_30_seconds: Lead and Follow still has one real playable anchor: a phone-served prologue and first dance checkpoint. The strongest next evidence is whether actual body contact and one knee response make the pair read as partners at phone scale. Three ideas were accepted locally: isolate the exact chemistry break, test one contact-to-knee prototype, and require the response to read without abstract connection lines. Three were declined and refilled from different angles. Finance and trust abstained because the packet does not support those claims. Nothing was dispatched.
